headline: 3 Reasons to Sell NVR and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Over the last six months, NVR shares have sunk to $6,549, producing a disappointing 18.5% loss - worse than the S&P 500’s 1.3% drop. This may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.
